description: MCP server for Jumio — global identity verification + KYX: documents, liveness, AML screening
name: io.github.codespar/mcp-jumio

environmentVariables.description: Jumio API token (sent as the username component of HTTP Basic auth).
environmentVariables.name: JUMIO_API_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Jumio API secret (sent as the password component of HTTP Basic auth).
environmentVariables.name: JUMIO_API_SECRET

environmentVariables.description: Merchant User-Agent string. Jumio requires a custom User-Agent header identifying the calling application (e.g. 'AcmeCorp KYX/1.0').
environmentVariables.name: JUMIO_USER_AGENT

environmentVariables.description: Region for the API host: 'us' (api.amer-1.jumio.ai), 'eu' (api.emea-1.jumio.ai), 'sg' (api.apac-1.jumio.ai). Defaults to 'us'.
environmentVariables.name: JUMIO_REGION
